name: HashKey Group
fullText:
A recent @caixin article takes a closer look at HashKey Group’s 2025 Annual Results, raising a broader question on how regulated digital asset platforms should be understood.

Beyond short-term metrics, it points to a shift toward tokenisation, on-chain infrastructure, and AI
